emails.subject: Re: New Address
emails.body: How dare you take such a tone with my counsellor. You're just bitter that you have squandered all rights to your furniture. Face it, your furniture likes me better anyway now. Forwarded by Gerald Nemec/HOU/ECT on 10/13/2000 02:25 PM Bruce Rudy@ENRON 10/13/2000 10:13 AM

emails.subject: Re: New Address
emails.body: My furniture has been abused and is frightened. I am going to liberate it from the fear of a topless G$ sleeping on it with a Whataburger set precariously upon his chest. Hell, that would scare the heck out of any one/thing. I advise you not to use Hendon as your counselor. Gerald Nemec@ECT 10/13/2000 01:27 PM

emails.subject: New Address
emails.body: New Address Hello All, With my last day at Enron quickly approaching, I thought it would be a good idea to set everyone up with my new address and phone in Ann Arbor. Here you go. 110 Depot Street Ann Arbor, MI 48104 (H): 734-214-3815 My future email address will be: brudy@umich.edu This won't be active until September 5 though, so you can reach me between now and then at my internet email: bruce_rudy@lycos.com Hope all is well with everyone. Take Care, Bruce
